items.title: Anthropic長約鎖定AWS 5GW算力，Amazon加碼投資最高250億
items.summary: Anthropic週一（4/20）宣布，已與Amazon簽署新的長期合作協議，將在未來10年投入超過1000億美元採購AWS算力，並取得最高5GW的運算容量，用於訓練與部署Claude模型。雙方同時擴大資本合作，Amazon將先投資50億美元，未來依商業里程碑再追加最多200億美元。

items.title: 藍色起源發射失誤導致衛星報廢，商業發射能力面臨市場檢驗
items.summary: 美國衛星通訊公司AST SpaceMobile週日（4/19）指出，其搭載藍色起源（Blue Origin）New Glenn火箭發射的BlueBird 7衛星，在任務中被送入低於預期的軌道。雖然衛星成功分離並啟動，但由於高度不足，無法透過自身推進系統維持運行，最終將進行脫軌處理，等同任務失敗。

items.title: 蘋果執行長接班人選定案！Tim Cook交棒硬體工程資深副總裁John Ternus，9月上任
items.summary: 蘋果週一（4/20）宣布，將由硬體工程資深副總裁John Ternus接任該公司的新執行長，預計於9月1日上任，屆時Ternus也將進入蘋果董事會。而現任執行長Tim Cook這段期間將協助交接，之後則會出任蘋果董事會的執行董事長。

items.title: fix(model-selection): address Codex review P2 feedback on auto-heal o…
items.summary: fix(model-selection): address Codex review P2 feedback on auto-heal override clearing Three corrections to the auto-failover self-healing introduced in the prior commit: 1. Reset in-memory provider/model to configured primary after clearing auto override. get-reply-directives.ts preloads provider/model from the stored override before calling createModelSelectionState, so clearing only session state still ran the current turn on the fallback. Now provider/model are reset to defaultProvider/ defaultModel so this turn retries the primary immediately, not on the next turn. 2. Remove resetModelOverride = true from the auto-heal path. That flag triggers a "Model override not allowed for this agent" system event in applyInlineDirectiveOverrides, which is incorrect: the override was valid and set by the fallback loop — it just expired once the primary recovered. Auto-heal is not an allowlist violation. 3. Add a test case that verifies the in-memory reset when the caller pre-loads the fallback provider/model (simulating the get-reply-directives.ts preload path). Known limitation (noted in comment): channel model overrides (channels.modelByChannel) are skipped on the recovery turn because hasSessionModelOverride was true when they were evaluated at preload time. They resume on the following turn once session state is clear. Fixing this cleanly requires changes to the get-reply-directives preload flow and is out of scope for this PR.
